title: Behavior Tree or Utility AI Game
genericDescription: Implement structured non-player behavior; debug decision logic; create enemies or companions that signal intent.
specificDescription: Build a game with at least two AI actors using a behavior tree, utility scoring, finite-state machine with clear hierarchy, or equivalent architecture. Include a debug display of current decisions.
gradingRubric: 30 pts AI architecture; 20 pts gameplay use of AI; 20 pts readable telegraphing; 15 pts debug display; 15 pts code commentary.
